label: LLM Provider
description: Specifies which LLM provider to use for sentiment classification and reserve attestation extraction features.

label: LLM API Key
description: Used by all LLM features (sentiment classification, reserve attestation extraction). Provider-agnostic name so the app can swap providers without touching code.

label: LLM Base URL
description: Base URL for LLM API endpoints, required for some providers like Gemini or OpenAI-compatible proxies.

label: LLM Model
description: Default model ID used by the LLM abstraction for sentiment classification and structured extraction.

label: CoinGecko API Key
description: API key for CoinGecko market data integration used by MC-1, MC-5, and MC-8 variables.

label: Quotient API Key
description: API key for Quotient on-chain analytics service used by OC-7 holder concentration variable.

label: X (Twitter) Bearer Token
description: Bearer token for X API v2 used by SE-2 negative sentiment volume variable.

label: Jina Reader API Key
description: API key for Jina Reader service used for news article fetching (SE-4) and attestation document text extraction (RQ variables).

label: SMTP Host
description: SMTP server hostname for sending magic link emails and admin notifications.

label: SMTP Port
description: SMTP server port for email delivery.

label: SMTP Username
description: SMTP authentication username for email delivery.

label: SMTP Password
description: SMTP authentication password for email delivery.

label: SMTP From Address
description: From email address used for magic links and admin notifications.

label: SSO Client ID
description: OAuth client ID for optional SSO authentication integration.

label: SSO Client Secret
description: OAuth client secret for optional SSO authentication integration.

label: SSO Issuer URL
description: OAuth issuer URL for optional SSO authentication integration.

label: Use Redis Queue
description: Set to 1 to route background jobs through BullMQ + Redis; default in-process Promise queue keeps the demo working without Redis.

label: DockerHub Username
description: DockerHub username for deploy.sh workflow to push production images.

label: DockerHub Access Token
description: DockerHub access token for deploy.sh workflow authentication.
